caption: The video begins with a static image of the Thinkorswim logo, which features a green starburst design on the left side and the company name "thinkorswim" in lowercase black letters to the right. The background is plain white, creating a clean and professional look. The logo remains centered on the screen throughout the initial frames, suggesting that this segment serves as an introductory or branding sequence for the video content that follows. There are no changes or movements in the logo or background during these frames, indicating a deliberate pause to allow viewers to recognize and associate with the brand before transitioning to the main content of the video.
